behavior_summary: Responds to the object's 'U8P_CANOPY::look' (examine) event by producing a short in-game text/dialog from the canopy item: the literal string "canopy ".
Per-call setup opcodes are executed (inferred set-info / process-exclude style operations) before the message is delivered; no persistent global state is modified.
The handler constructs the message string, calls the engine/item routine to display it (Item::bark), frees the temporary string, and then suspends/returns the script.
notable_control_flow: Entry on a trigger-style event (Event 0 / U8P_CANOPY::look).
Simple linear flow: prepare state, allocate/build literal message, call Item::bark, free the message, handle the bark return value (pushed/used by an implies/pop), then suspend/return.
No loops, no iterations, and no global flag branching observed in this script.
open_questions: Exact semantics of the 'set info' / 'process exclude' opcodes in this handler: what precise per-object state or exclusion is being applied and whether it affects future processing of this item.
Whether the returned value from Item::bark (pushed and consumed by an implies) can affect other engine-level behavior outside this short handler.
Whether other events for the canopy share or rely on the same info key that this handler briefly sets (if any).

main_function.name: U8P_CANOPY::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_CANOPY::look' (examine) event for a canopy item by making the item emit a short description/dialog ('canopy ').
entry_conditions: Event 0: invoked when an actor (typically the Avatar) examines or 'looks' at the canopy object (area/interaction trigger).

function_map.name: U8P_CANOPY::look
function_map.role: Event handler for the canopy object's 'U8P_CANOPY::look' (examine) action.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to display a short text/dialog message sourced from an item/process.

external_calls.purpose: Deliver/display a short in-game message coming from the canopy item; called with the canopy object instance and the string "canopy ".

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Responds to the object's 'U8P_CANOPY::look' (examine) event by producing a short in-game text/dialog from the canopy item: the literal string "canopy ".
